author: IGN YouTube
text:
Tekken 8 - Official Yujiro Hanma Announcement Trailer
Watch the Yujiro Hanma Announcement Trailer for Tekken 8, an action fighting game developed by Bandi Namco. Yujiro Hanma is launching in early 2027. Tekken 8 is available now for PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X|S, and PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Rocket League - Official 'A New Era' Teaser Trailer
Take a look at the New Era teaser trailer from Rocket League, the hit action vehicular football (soccer) game developed by Psyonix and Epic Games. Players can get the first look at the new era of Rocket League announced at the Paris Majors, with the reveal of a new version of Rocket League coming soon that's powered by Unreal Engine 6. Get the first look at Unreal Engine 6 in Rocket League, coming soon to consoles and PC.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Red Light On - Official Gameplay Trailer 2
Get a fresh look at the latest gameplay from Red Light On, a hyper-realistic single-player first-person shooter developed by V Games. Players will embody a tactical officer investigating a case that goes awry. Fall back on combat tactics and utilize investigative abilities to seek the truth behind the case. Red Light On is coming soon to PC (Steam).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Rocket League Championship Series Paris Major Final
Live from Paris, catch the Rocket League Championship Series Paris Major. IGN will be streaming the Semifinal and Final matches beginning 8am PT / 11 ET from La Défense Arena in Paris, France. Tune in to watch the final 4 teams battle for the championship of the 2026's second RLCS major.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Her Private Hell - Official Teaser Trailer
Watch the Teaser Trailer for Her Private Hell, a slasher supernatural drama film distributed by NEON. Witness a harrowing future story to take on a rescue mission to Hell in Her Private Hell, in theaters on July 24.

When a mysterious mist engulfs a futuristic metropolis, unleashing a deadly and elusive entity, a troubled young woman searches for her father. Her quest collides with an American GI on a harrowing odyssey to rescue his daughter from Hell.

Her Private Hell stars Sophie Thatcher, Charles Melton, Kristine Froseth, Havana Rose Liu, Diego Calva, and more. The film is directed by Nicolas Winding Refn and written by Esti Giordani and Nicolas Winding Refn.

Her Private Hell is in theaters on July 24.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
The Westies (MGM+ 2026 Series) - Official Teaser
The Westies is a gritty and kinetic crime drama centering on New York City’s infamously violent Irish gang of the same name. The series is set in the early 1980s when the construction of the Jacob Javits Convention Center on the Westies’ home turf in Hell’s Kitchen promises a financial windfall. Despite being outnumbered fifty-to-one by the Five Families of the Italian Mafia, the Westies’ legendary brutality and cunning have given them the leverage necessary to share the spoils through a fragile détente. But internal conflict between the brash younger generation and the old-school leadership threatens to set a match to this powder keg, which will sweep the Westies into the FBI’s ever-deepening investigation into the Italian mafia.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Vought Rising - Official Teaser Trailer
Check out a first look at Vought Rising, the highly anticipated new series set within the world of the multi-Emmy Award-winning global phenomenon, The Boys, starring Jensen Ackles and Aya Cash. The electrifying teaser offers a first glimpse at the next chapter, premiering in 2027.
Set in the 1950s, the prequel series explores the twisted origins of Vought International. The teaser offers a diabolical first look at the world and story that will define this next evolution of the franchise.
Vought Rising  will star Jensen Ackles and Aya Cash, who will also serve as producers. The series also stars Mason Dye, Will Hochman, KiKi Layne, Jorden Myrie, Nicolo Pasetti, Elizabeth Posey, Ricky Staffieri, and Brian J. Smith. Paul Grellong will serve as showrunner and executive producer. Eric Kripke, Seth Rogen, Evan Goldberg, James Weaver, Neal H. Moritz, Pavun Shetty, Ori Marmur, Ken Levin, Jason Netter, Garth Ennis, Darick Robertson, Michaela Starr, and Jim Barnes also serve as executive producers on the series. The series is produced by Sony Pictures Television and Amazon MGM Studios, in association with Kripke Enterprises, Point Grey Pictures, and Original Film.
Vought Rising will premiere exclusively on Prime Video in 2027.

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Where Winds Meet - Official Imperial Palace World Boss 'Cat Emperor' Trailer
Check out the 'Cat Emperor' trailer for the new expansion for Where Winds Meet, the hit free-to-play action open-world game developed by Everstone Studio. The Cat Emperor almost caused a disaster during a night tour of the museum! The trick to avoiding the guards? A crafty transformation into a distant cousin: the Lynx Figurine! Imperial Palace World Boss 'Cat Emperor' arrives May 28. The Imperial Palace expansion for Where Winds Meet is launching on May 28 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), iOS, Android, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and Windows).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Where Winds Meet - Official Imperial Palace World Boss 'Gilded Lament' Trailer
Check out the 'Gilded Lament' trailer for the new expansion for Where Winds Meet, the hit free-to-play action open-world game developed by Everstone Studio. Players will soon find that there is more to the Imperial Palace than just thrilling adventures. Step into a hidden world deep within its walls... What tales are told by the figures trapped here and the endless poems that fill the air? The Imperial Palace expansion for Where Winds Meet is launching on May 28 for PlayStation 5 (PS5), iOS, Android, and PC (Steam, Epic Games Store, and Windows).

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Final Fantasy 7 Ever Crisis - Official Dirge of Cerberus Chaos Collides Trailer
Take a look at the Dirge of Cerberus Chaos Collides event release date trailer for Final Fantasy 7 Ever Crisis, a turn-based remake of the classic RPG developed by Applibot and Square Enix. Players will be able to play through the events of the third-person shooter installment of the Final Fantasy 7 story, Dirge of Cerberus, remade in a turn-based fashion. The Dirge of Cerberus Chaos Collides event will take place on May 27 for iOS, Android, and PC (Steam).

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Hands Over: Official Announcement Trailer
Get your first look at Hands Over, a multiplayer horror party game where you'll be playing your favorite childhood games...except here, they can be fatal. Players sit at the table and face brutal versions of games like Crocodile Dentist, Pie Face, and memory challenges. Every turn is built around tension, bluffing, sabotage, and the fear that one small mistake could end the round. You understand the danger in seconds, but every match can turn into a mind game: who is bluffing, who is setting a trap, and who is about to lose more than just the round? Wishlist it on Steam if you're interested: https://store.steampowered.com/app/4661070/HANDS_OVER/

#ign #gaming

author: IGN YouTube
text:
Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game - Official Azula Reveal Trailer
True power, the divine right to rule, is something she was born with. Meet Azula and see the character in action in this latest trailer for Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game, an upcoming 2D anime action fighting game based on the Avatar: The Last Airbender and The Legend of Korra series, developed by Gameplay Group International in collaboration with Paramount. 


Azula's unraveling psyche and duality turns into her greatest strength, from poise and precision to mellifluous madness. Unlike a certain exiled prince, she settles for nothing less than perfection.


Avatar Legends: The Fighting Game will be available on PlayStation 5 (PS5), Xbox Series X/S, and PC via Steam on July 2, 2026. It is also coming to Nintendo Switch and Nintendo Switch 2 at a later date.


Preorder on Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2424420/Avatar_Legends_The_Fighting_Game/

Wishlist on PS5: 
https://store.playstation.com/en-us/concept/10018989/

Wishlist on Xbox Series X|S: 
https://www.xbox.com/en-us/games/store/avatar-legends-the-fighting-game/9ph2332vrwsf
